positioning points now the key with court positioning is that you want to position yourself in between the max angles that your opponent can generate based on where they are hitting the ball on the tennis court so in other words if you've got your opponent and he's smack dab in the middle of the court the maximum angles he can generate are going to be equal more or less on both end of the court
